infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CamTok uses your location while you stream so viewers can follow your drive on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: CamTok uses your location while you stream so viewers can follow your drive on the map.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CamTok uses your camera to broadcast your live stream.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CamTok uses your microphone to broadcast audio with your stream.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow CamTok to use your location while you're streaming.
